creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Greetings!

I am sorry for the empty start-post (wrong key pressed).

According to mails from <pkg-fallout@FreeBSD.org> with the subject
> [package - head-i386-default][games/xboard-devel] Failed for xboard-devel-4.8.0.20151020.3 in build
and
> [package - head-i386-default][games/xboard-devel] Failed for xboard-devel-4.8.0.20151020.3 in build
this port does not build.

On 12.1 in poudriere it does build.

I have to look into it—well some cosmetics (warnings occur) are due anyway,
and a far more recent version would be a good idea, I think ;-)

Regards,
 Kalten

Following thereafter the content of the mail:
...8<---

>      CRAFTY=off: Install crafty engine
>      GNUCHESS=off: Install GnuChess engine
>      KNIGHTCAP=off: Install KnightCap engine
>      PHALANX=off: Install phalanx engine
> ====> Front End: you have to select exactly one of them

>      XAW3D=off: Xaw3d GUI toolkit support (not fully supported)
>      GTK2=off: GTK+ 2 GUI toolkit support (experimental)
